reviews.review_description: I've tried it yesterday for the first time. Beware that by default some videos are not in the library (the most interesting ones of course). The quality of the video is very low - too low resolution. There is no narrative. Just a 1 minute 3D video. Interesting, but feels like something is missing
The app is constantly improving, new videos and features.
Downloaded the app and there’s absolutely no content available. Clicked on every continent and it’s just an empty screen. Super disappointing.
Could be a great app, just what iv been waiting for but unfortunately it’s blurry and freezes a lot

I was very happy to see so animal-packed content to show to my animal-loving kid. The quality isn't great (tho it might be better after you download the video - I haven't checked), the most disappointing thing tho was that none of the videos was stereoscopic - which matters a lot. Stereoscopic 180VR is a way better approach to immersive VR experience videos, than flat 360. Flat 360 is cool on your phone with gyro and that's it.

From cute fox kits playing to crocodiles in the Nile River to birds of paradise - this app has 360 videos of some of the most epic wildlife experiences! And it puts you right in the middle of it, able to look around like you're there.

I've had hours of entertainment out of this app and haven't even seen everything yet!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the stellar review!  We've been working hard!

reviews.review_description: 0 stars.    All it ever says is that i'm offline----i'm not.
I can believe how close you get to the animals. And the variety of species is incredible.  Please add a section where you go on a safari drive!
App says I am offline even though all my other apps work fine downloading from the Internet

reviews.review_title: Virtual Safari That Rivals a Real One
reviews.review_description: As a wildlife photographer I’ve never experienced anything like what I found In WildXR. I was transported into each animal’s world to watch them behave naturally and without human influences. I’m ready for a safari now!

Amazing to see animals in the wild in a virtual reality experience. Such a nice educational experience also. Get to see so many species that are so rare. The friends and family members that I've shown it to also live it.

I’m having a great time exploring the world with this app. Not only is it cool seeing all the animals up close but getting to see the different places is a thrill.

Great selection of video lengths as well, from less than a minute to a few short documentaries.

Would love to see more underwater experiences and some more reptiles!!
Hello, unfortunately the app doesn't work yet. The app says I'm in offline mode.
The newest version is handling the online/offline problems previously experienced. There are now over 250 videos available for streaming and downloading!
